problem id: 5cd4a382
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10100001 -> 00010101
  00100011 -> 00110001
  10010110 -> 01100100
  11110011 -> 00110111
  10110100 -> 01000101
  10011100 -> 11000100
  10101001 -> 10010101
  11001101 -> 11010110
  11111100 -> 11000111

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 10100110
